title: SSC Selection Post Phase XIV 2026 Notification
pattern_table:
Subject|Questions|Marks
General Intelligence|25|50
General Awareness|25|50
Quantitative Aptitude|25|50
English Language|25|50
instructions: Apply online at ssc.gov.in. One-time registration (OTR) is mandatory.
selection_process: Computer Based Examination (CBE) scheduled for May/June 2026.
job_description: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the 2026 calendar. This recruitment covers Phase XIV selection posts for various central government departments.

title: RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 2026 Cycle
age_limit: 18-35 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories.
qualification: Matriculation / SSLC plus ITI from recognized institutions of NCVT/SCVT.
pattern_table:
Stage|Subject|Marks
CBT-1|Maths, Reasoning, Science, GA|75
CBT-2|Part A (Technical) & Part B|175
instructions: Medical standards for ALP are very strict. Candidates must have distance vision 6/6 without glasses.
selection_process: CBT-1, CBT-2, Computer Based Aptitude Test (CBAT), and Medical Exam.
job_description: Indian Railways announces the mega recruitment drive for ALPs in 2026. High focus on safety and technical standards.

title: IBPS CRP Clerk XV Recruitment 2026
qualification: Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Test|No. of Qs|Max Marks|Time
English Language|30|30|20 Min
Numerical Ability|35|35|20 Min
Reasoning Ability|35|35|20 Min
instructions: Registration is through IBPS official portal. Candidates must have a valid personal email ID.
selection_process: Two-tier online examination (Preliminary and Main) scheduled for August 2026.
job_description: IBPS is conducting the Common Recruitment Process for selection of Clerical cadre posts in participating banks for the 2026-27 financial year.

title: SBI Junior Associates (Clerical) 2026
qualification: Graduation in any discipline. Those in the final year can also apply.
pattern_table:
Test|Marks|Duration
English Language|30|20 Min
Numerical Ability|35|20 Min
Reasoning Ability|35|20 Min
instructions: Candidates can apply for vacancies in one State only. LPT will be conducted.
selection_process: Preliminary Exam, Main Exam, and Local Language Test (LPT).
job_description: SBI is hiring Junior Associates for customer support and sales. This is one of the best entry-level jobs in the banking sector.
